Release: 0.1.0 (2026-03-10)

Changes:
- Improve WeChat publish flow by adding fallback confirmation clicks in `scripts/weixin-article.sh`.
- Package skill artifact at `dist/social-push-skill-skill.skill`.
- Install to `~/.codex/skills/social-push-skill-skill` and `~/.agents/skills/social-push-skill-skill`.
